zh.Stonyhurst, Clitheroe, Lancashire, Engla: 英國英格蘭藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Sherburne於1381年10月12日出生在英國藍卡爾可利黑洛時，他的父親Richard Bayley23歲，母親Margaret de Sherburne23歲。他和Agnes Harington至少有6個兒子和5個女兒。他去世於1441年5月29日在英國藍卡爾斯托爾斯特享年59歲，埋葬在英國越可爾米頓。

zh-hans.Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Sherburne于1381年10月12日出生在英国藍卡爾可利黑洛时，他的父亲Richard Bayley23岁，母亲Margaret de Sherburne23岁。他和Agnes Harington至少有6个儿子和5个女儿。他去世于1441年5月29日在英国藍卡爾斯托爾斯特享年59岁，埋葬在英国越可爾米頓。

nameMeanings.name: Sherburne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from any of several places called with Old English scīr ‘bright, clear’ + burna ‘stream’, including Sherburn in Elmet (Yorkshire), Sherburn (East Yorkshire, Durham), Shirburn (Oxfordshire), Sherborne (Dorset, Gloucestershire), Sherborne Saint John, Monk Sherborne (Hampshire), Sherbourne (Warwickshire), Sherbourne in Albury (Surrey), and Sherborne in Litton (Somerset). This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Sherbon
meanings: English: variant of Sherburne with loss of the second -r- by dissimilation. This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Sherburne was born on 12 October 1381, in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England, his father, Richard Bayley, was 23 and his mother, Margaret de Sherburne, was 23. He had at least 6 sons and 5 daughters with Agnes Harington. He died on 29 May 1441, in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, at the age of 59, and was buried in Mitton, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Sherburne est né le 12 octobre 1381, à Clitheroe, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Bayley, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Sherburne, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles avec Agnes Harington. Il est décédé le 29 mai 1441, à Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Mitton, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Sherburne am 12. Oktober 1381 in Clitheroe, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Bayley 23 und seine Mutter Margaret de Sherburne 23. Er hatte mit Agnes Harington mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 29. Mai 1441 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England und wurde in Mitton, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Sherburne è nato il il 12 ottobre 1381 nel Clitheroe, Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Richard Bayley, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Sherburne, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie con Agnes Harington. Morì il 29 maggio 1441, nel Stonyhurst, Lancashire, England, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Mitton, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Sherburneが1381年10月12日にイギリスランカシュアイアクリスエローで生まれた時，父Richard Bayleyは23歳，母Margaret de Sherburneは23歳であった。彼はAgnes Haringtonとの間に少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘をもうけた。彼は1441年5月29日にイギリスランカシュアイアストニーハルストで59歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアミットオンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Sherburne(이)가 1381년 10월 12일 영국 랭카실르 클리더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Bayley(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Sherburne(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Agnes Harington(와)과 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1441년 5월 29일 영국 랭카실르 스토니후르스트에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 미턴에 묻혔다.

pt.12 October 1381–29 May 1441: 12 de outubro de 1381–29 de maio de 1441
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Sherburne nasceu em 12 de outubro de 1381, em Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Bayley, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Sherburne, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas com Agnes Harington. Ele faleceu em 29 de maio de 1441, em Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Mitton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Sherburne родился 12 октября 1381 г. в местности клитиро, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Bayley было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Sherburne, 23. У него было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей от Agnes Harington. Он умер 29 мая 1441 г. в местности стонихурст, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности миттон, еркшир, Англия.

es.12 October 1381–29 May 1441: 12 de octubre de 1381–29 de mayo de 1441
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Sherburne nació el 12 de octubre de 1381, en Clitheroe, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Bayley, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Margaret de Sherburne, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas con Agnes Harington. Murió el 29 de mayo de 1441, en Stonyhurst, Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Mitton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
